![delphi-msbuild logo](https://continuous-delphi.github.io/assets/logos/delphi-msbuild-480x270.png)

[https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-msbuild](https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-msbuild)

**Tag:** `vX.Y.Z`

**Direct download:** [delphi-msbuild.ps1](https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-msbuild/releases/download/vX.Y.Z/delphi-msbuild.ps1)

This release improves `delphi-msbuild`, a Continuous Delphi utility that builds
Delphi `.dproj` projects using MSBuild from the command line.  It sources
`rsvars.bat` before invoking MSBuild and is designed to accept piped output
from `delphi-inspect -DetectLatest -BuildSystem MSBuild`.

---
